cards.hook: Another DeFi protocol just got hit. Do you know which?
cards.caption: Another DeFi protocol got hit by a new security exploit. If you hold anything on-chain, the gap between the breach and the headline is where you get liquidated. Surfaced before the timeline knew.
cards.stance: "Audited" means nothing — DeFi ships bugs to prod with your money as the test suite.

cards.hook: Aave, Uniswap and Balancer just started banning users.
cards.caption: Aave, Uniswap and Balancer are blocking Tornado Cash wallets. "Permissionless" DeFi just picked a side. If you thought DeFi couldn't ban you, read this. The signal my feed keeps.
cards.stance: Frontends that block wallets prove DeFi is only as decentralized as its most scared team.

cards.hook: A tokenized Google stock got inflated 7,700% — and drained $403K.
cards.caption: An exploit pumped a tokenized Google stock to 78x its worth, leaving $403K in bad debt — and Chainlink oracles missed it. Tokenized stocks are only as safe as the price feed. Found before the timeline.
cards.stance: Tokenized equities inherit every oracle bug crypto never fixed.

cards.hook: Euler just lost nearly $200M in four transactions.
cards.caption: The Euler DeFi protocol got drained for ~$185M across four transactions in DAI and wrapped BTC. One flash-loan flaw, nine figures gone. This is the risk nobody prices in. Surfaced before the panic.
cards.stance: Every DeFi "blue chip" is one clever transaction away from zero.

cards.hook: Attackers minted 40 quintillion tokens out of thin air.
cards.caption: The Cover protocol got exploited — attackers minted at least 40 quintillion tokens and nuked the price to zero. Infinite mint bugs are the DeFi nightmare nobody stress-tests for. The stuff my feed keeps.
cards.stance: An infinite-mint bug turns your token into confetti in one block.

cards.hook: The EU just voted to regulate your DeFi, staking and NFTs.
cards.caption: The European Parliament advanced a resolution to assess DeFi, staking and NFTs — full plenary vote is scheduled. If you're on-chain in the EU, this shapes what's still legal. Found before the timeline.
cards.stance: Regulators don't need to ban DeFi — they just regulate the fiat on-ramps you depend on.

cards.hook: MetaMask now pays you up to 4% APY on stablecoins.
cards.caption: MetaMask (30M+ users) launched a self-custody Money Account: yield, payments and trading in one wallet, up to 4% on stablecoins. The wallet just became a bank you actually hold the keys to. The signal my feed keeps.
cards.stance: Self-custody yield beats any exchange that can freeze you at 4%.

cards.hook: The paradox of DeFi: the more "decentralized," the more fragile.
cards.caption: A new SSRN paper maps the paradox of DeFi — the features that make it trustless are the same ones that make it exploitable. If you build or invest on-chain, read the risk model. The stuff my feed keeps.
cards.stance: DeFi's decentralization isn't a safety feature — it's an attack surface nobody can patch fast enough.
